steps.title: Compare the spreads
steps.content: Standard deviation measures how spread out the data are from the center. In the histograms, team A's scores are more tightly clustered, while team B's scores cover a wider interval.

steps.title: Connect spread to deviation
steps.content: A narrower distribution has a smaller standard deviation than a wider distribution. So the standard deviation for team A is less than the standard deviation for team B. The answer is A.
